mnemonics: BEEF Clicks: Browser, Element, Event, Form events to remember different event types
keyPoints: Event types are categorized by their source: Browser, DOM Element, User Input, and Network events
Event handlers are functions that run in response to specific events
Understanding event propagation (bubbling and capturing) is crucial for proper event handling
commonMistakes: Forgetting to prevent default browser behavior when needed (e.g., form submission)
Adding event listeners to elements that don't exist in the DOM yet
